publishedAbstract: When a glusterfs volume delete is attempted from heketi, it fails with an error that one of the brick filesystem is in use. ~~~ sh-4.2# heketi-cli volume delete 25bd167d686e38a2594da8f3599b8969 Error: Logical volume vg_026c7bb8f92d96c2c0e0c458eaa19b6e/brick_780bc0652dfa7d8dfc2d498b8f0e4fb5 contains a filesystem in use. ~~~
publishedTitle: Deleting a gluster volume from heketi failed with error "Logical volume contains a filesystem in use."
